- ruleID: sd-required-prop-builderimageselector-builderimages
  labels:
  - source=semver-analyzer
  - change-type=required-prop-added
  - package=@patternfly/dev-console
  effort: 1
  category: mandatory
  description: '<BuilderImageSelector> now requires the `builderImages` prop (type: `NormalizedBuilderImages`)'
  message: |-
    <BuilderImageSelector> has a new required prop `builderImages` (type: `NormalizedBuilderImages`).
    This prop must be provided — omitting it will cause a TypeScript error.

    Add the prop: <BuilderImageSelector builderImages={...} />
  when:
    frontend.referenced:
      pattern: ^BuilderImageSelector$
      location: JSX_COMPONENT
      from: '@patternfly/dev-console'
- ruleID: sd-required-prop-builderimageselector-loadingimagestream

  category: mandatory
  description: '<BuilderImageSelector> now requires the `loadingImageStream` prop (type: `boolean`)'
  message: |-
    <BuilderImageSelector> has a new required prop `loadingImageStream` (type: `boolean`).
